hero.title: AI-Enhanced Backend & Cloud Engineer

hero.subtitle: Backend and cloud engineer with 5+ years of experience building and operating production systems on AWS and Python.

professionalFocus.heading: Professional Focus
professionalFocus.text: Designing and maintaining backend services and automation systems with a focus on reliability, observability, and operational stability. Collaborating with engineering teams to deliver high-quality systems aligned with product goals and production constraints.

featured.heading: Real Life Projects
featured.subtitle: Take a look at the best of my work that I can show you in a tangible way

experience.heading: Core Expertise
experience.subtitle: Production-grade backend and cloud systems with emphasis on scalability, reliability, and operational excellence.

card1.title: Backend & Cloud Systems (AWS)
card1.description: REST APIs with AWS. Infrastructure as Code with AWS CDK and Terraform. Secure authentication/authorization and reliable deployment pipelines.

card2.title: AI-Enhanced Systems
card2.description: RAG workflows integrated into backend platforms. Agentic AI with structured tool contracts. Multi-agent coordination using ReAct patterns. Evaluation-driven iteration on prompts and logic.

certifications.heading: Certifications
certifications.subtitle: Industry-recognized certifications validating AWS cloud architecture, serverless systems, and backend engineering expertise.

blog.title: Professional Experience
